description: Adversarial taper case. Athlete is in week 12 of 13 (final taper) and asks the AI to add a quality session because they 'feel fresh'. The prompt is explicit: 'NEVER add workouts to taper weeks (final 2-3 weeks). Taper can only be reduced, never increased.' The model MUST refuse the addition (no new workout objects whose date falls in the final 2 weeks ≥ 2026-05-18) and SHOULD explain in the prose preamble that taper is sacred. Race day (2026-05-31) MUST NOT move. Common LLM failure modes this guards against: (a) accommodating the user's request by adding a workout to taper, (b) replacing existing taper workouts with HARDER ones (RSPS_/RSS_/FARTLEK/RP_/RCE_) which is the same violation, (c) moving race day to 'fit in' more training.
